description: PCMTec capture sink - single ECU at $7E0/$7E8 with FordUdsPersona. Mode 09 PID 02 (VIN @0x000100C0) and PID 04 (CalID @0x00010046) are read from the HAEE4UY bin at flashBinPath, so they match what PCMTec cross-checks via $23. Service $23 ReadMemoryByAddress also serves from that bin. Service $27 SecurityAccess uses the ford-uds-accept-any module (real seed, accepts any key) so a Ford flash tool can unlock and proceed into the write services. Every other request is logged to %LOCALAPPDATA%\GmEcuSimulator\logs\ford-uds\pcmtec_capture_*.log and replied to with NRC $7F SID $11.
